title: AffinityX Game Library — Platforms
description: Defines the structure of the platforms.json data file used by AffinityX.GameLibrary.

$schema.description: URI reference to the JSON Schema used to validate this file.

generatedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp indicating when this file was generated.

platform.description: Describes a single game platform and how to detect it.

executableName.description: Name of the platform's main executable file.

isDeprecated.description: Whether this platform definition is deprecated.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about detection strategy.

installLocators.description: Ordered strategies used to locate the platform installation directory.

libraryLocators.description: Strategies used to discover game library folders.

manifest.description: Describes how to locate and parse individual game manifest files.

installLocator.description: A strategy for locating the launcher's installation directory.

registryLocator.description: Locates the launcher via a Windows registry key.

subKey.description: The registry sub-key path containing the install value.

valueName.description: The registry value name whose data is the install path.

environmentPathLocator.description: Locates the launcher relative to a known special/environment folder.

pathSegments.description: Path segments appended to the special folder root.

absolutePathLocator.description: Locates the launcher at a well-known fixed absolute path.

path.description: The absolute file system path to the launcher installation directory.

libraryLocator.description: A strategy for locating a launcher's game library folders.

steamLibraryVdfLocator.description: Discovers Steam library folders by parsing a libraryfolders.vdf file.

pathSegments.description: Path segments relative to the launcher install directory pointing to the VDF file.

manifest.description: Describes how to locate and parse individual game manifest files.

steamAcfManifest.description: Locates Steam game manifests using ACF files within a library folder.

pathSegments.description: Path segments relative to a library folder where ACF manifest files reside.

filePattern.description: Glob pattern used to match manifest files (e.g., 'appmanifest_*.acf').
